---
title: "Anurag builds things"
title-block-banner: false
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
        #title-block-header { display: none; }
        .anchorjs-link { display: none !important; }
      </style>
      <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
          var section = document.querySelector('section.level2');
          var listing = document.querySelector('#listing-listing');
          if (section && listing) {
            new ResizeObserver(function() {
              section.style.width = listing.offsetWidth + 'px';
            }).observe(listing);
          }
        });
      </script>
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  # TODO: re-enable categories once there are more posts. Consider moving to navbar or horizontal bar above listing.
  categories: false
  feed: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
page-layout: full
toc: false
---
